option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Maven Installation via PowerShell - Complete Script # Run this entire script in PowerShell as Administrator
# ============================================================================ # STEP 1: Check if running as Administrator # ============================================================================ Write-Host "Checking Administrator privileges..." -ForegroundColor Yellow $isAdmin = ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal] [Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()).IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole] "Administrator")
if (-not $isAdmin) { Write-Host "ERROR: This script must run as Administrator" -ForegroundColor Red Write-Host "Please right-click PowerShell and select 'Run as Administrator'" -ForegroundColor Red exit 1 } Write-Host "✓ Running as Administrator" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host ""
# ============================================================================ # STEP 2: Check if Java is installed # ============================================================================ Write-Host "Checking Java installation..." -ForegroundColor Yellow try { $javaVersion = java -version 2>&1 Write-Host "✓ Java found:" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host $javaVersion[0] } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: Java is not installed or not in PATH" -ForegroundColor Red Write-Host "Please install Java 17+ first" -ForegroundColor Red exit 1 } Write-Host ""
# ============================================================================ # STEP 3: Check if Chocolatey is installed # ============================================================================ Write-Host "Checking for Chocolatey package manager..." -ForegroundColor Yellow $chocoInstalled = $null -ne (Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
if ($chocoInstalled) { Write-Host "✓ Chocolatey found" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host ""
# ======================================================================== # OPTION A: Install Maven via Chocolatey (RECOMMENDED) # ======================================================================== Write-Host "Installing Maven via Chocolatey..." -ForegroundColor Cyan
# Check if Maven is already installed $mavenExists = $null -ne (Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
if ($mavenExists) { Write-Host "✓ Maven is already installed" -ForegroundColor Green mvn --version } else { Write-Host "Running: choco install maven -y" -ForegroundColor Yellow choco install maven -y
if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host "✓ Maven installed successfully" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host "" Write-Host "IMPORTANT: Close this PowerShell window and open a NEW one" -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host "Then verify with: mvn --version" -ForegroundColor Yellow } else { Write-Host "ERROR: Chocolatey installation failed" -ForegroundColor Red Write-Host "Trying manual installation instead..." -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host "" } } } else { Write-Host "✗ Chocolatey not found (optional)" -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host "Proceeding with manual installation..." -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host "" }
# ============================================================================ # STEP 4: Manual Installation (if Chocolatey didn't work or isn't available) # ============================================================================ $mavenExists = $null -ne (Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
if (-not $mavenExists) { Write-Host "Installing Maven manually..." -ForegroundColor Cyan Write-Host ""
# Step 4a: Download Maven Write-Host "Step 1: Downloading Maven 3.9.6..." -ForegroundColor Yellow $MavenURL = "https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.6/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.6-bin.zip" $DownloadPath = "C:\Users\$env:USERNAME\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.6-bin.zip" $MavenPath = "C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.6"
if (Test-Path $DownloadPath) { Write-Host "✓ Maven ZIP already downloaded" -ForegroundColor Green } else { try { Write-Host "Downloading from: $MavenURL" -ForegroundColor Gray $ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue' Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $MavenURL -OutFile $DownloadPath Write-Host "✓ Maven downloaded" -ForegroundColor Green } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: Failed to download Maven" -ForegroundColor Red Write-Host $_.Exception.Message exit 1 } } Write-Host ""
# Step 4b: Extract Maven Write-Host "Step 2: Extracting Maven..." -ForegroundColor Yellow if (Test-Path $MavenPath) { Write-Host "✓ Maven already extracted to $MavenPath" -ForegroundColor Green } else { try { Write-Host "Extracting to: C:\Program Files\" -ForegroundColor Gray Expand-Archive -Path $DownloadPath -DestinationPath "C:\Program Files\" -Force Write-Host "✓ Maven extracted" -ForegroundColor Green } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: Failed to extract Maven" -ForegroundColor Red Write-Host $_.Exception.Message exit 1 } } Write-Host ""
# Step 4c: Set Environment Variables Write-Host "Step 3: Setting environment variables..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
# Check and find Java path $javaHome = $env:JAVA_HOME if (-not $javaHome) { # Try to find Java automatically $javaPath = Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source if ($javaPath) { $javaHome = Split-Path (Split-Path $javaPath) } else { # Default to common location $javaHome = "C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17" } }
Write-Host "Setting JAVA_HOME to: $javaHome" -ForegroundColor Gray [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("JAVA_HOME", $javaHome, "Machine")
Write-Host "Setting MAVEN_HOME to: $MavenPath" -ForegroundColor Gray [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("MAVEN_HOME", $MavenPath, "Machine")
# Add Maven to PATH $CurrentPath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("Path", "Machine") $MavenBinPath = "$MavenPath\bin"
if ($CurrentPath -notlike "*$MavenBinPath*") { Write-Host "Adding Maven bin directory to PATH" -ForegroundColor Gray $NewPath = $CurrentPath + ";$MavenBinPath" [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("Path", $NewPath, "Machine") } else { Write-Host "✓ Maven bin directory already in PATH" -ForegroundColor Green }
Write-Host "✓ Environment variables set" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host "" }
# ============================================================================ # STEP 5: Verification # ============================================================================ Write-Host "Step 4: Verification..." -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host ""
# Refresh PATH for current session $env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("Path","Machine") + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("Path","User")
$mavenExists = $null -ne (Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
if ($mavenExists) { Write-Host "✓ Maven is available in current session" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host "" mvn --version } else { Write-Host "⚠ Maven not yet available in current session" -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host "This is normal - the PATH was just updated" -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host "" }
# ============================================================================ # STEP 6: Final Instructions # ============================================================================ Write-Host "" Write-Host "========================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan Write-Host "Installation Complete!" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host "========================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan Write-Host "" Write-Host "✓ Maven has been installed" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host "✓ Environment variables have been set" -ForegroundColor Green Write-Host "" Write-Host "IMPORTANT NEXT STEPS:" -ForegroundColor Yellow Write-Host "" Write-Host "1. CLOSE this PowerShell window completely" -ForegroundColor White Write-Host "" Write-Host "2. OPEN a NEW PowerShell window" -ForegroundColor White Write-Host "" Write-Host "3. VERIFY Maven is working:" -ForegroundColor White Write-Host " mvn --version" -ForegroundColor Gray Write-Host "" Write-Host "4. RUN your tests:" -ForegroundColor White Write-Host " cd C:\Users\info2\Downloads\incident-rca-assistant" -ForegroundColor Gray Write-Host " mvn clean test" -ForegroundColor Gray Write-Host "" Write-Host "========================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan Write-Host "" Write-Host "Press any key to exit..." -ForegroundColor Yellow $null = $Host.UI.RawUI.ReadKey("NoEcho,IncludeKeyDown")
